name: Barael 6th Jungle Assault Legion
description:
You are in the command of the Barael 6th Jungle Assault Legion. They hail from the Barael tribes that reside on the jungle worlds and had harsh lives and upbringings. They are fiercely loyal to their Quordoban commanders who hail from the desert world of Quordoba that hosts the one of the most prestigious military academy in the Marinid Kingdom.
Some of your legionaries went to the same academy and are tactical geniuses with sharp wits. But you are facing on a clock. You need to pacify the world of Romaha before. Queen Nadiya grows in patient and orders a nuclear bombardment on the planet.
Disclaimers:
Potential Nuclear Attack
creator: ShahShakuras
